orientation.description: Layout orientation. Affects which arrow keys move between tabs.

activateOnFocus.description:
When true (default for horizontal), focusing a tab also activates it
(the panel updates immediately). Vertical defaults to manual activation
— the user moves focus with arrows, then presses Enter or Space.

unsupportedProps.name: onValueChange
unsupportedProps.description: Intercept a proposed tab value before the bindable value is written. Return a replacement value to transform it.
